content.en:
Rumble!!!!

Yan Zu and the other five supreme Dao ancestors joined forces to attack Ye Tian, and a gate extreme level supreme Dao technique bombarded him.

Ye Tian used the extreme level of the Ancient Desolate Body and the Nine Turns Immortal Golden Body to hardly shake the attacks of the five powerful Dao Ancestors, and the defense was broken layer by layer, and the body was cracked, but most of the attack power was offset by the Dacheng-level Forbidden Body, plus the power of the Forbidden Origin had been repairing the physical injuries, so the injuries were not large.

And Ye Tian also fought back, holding the Heaven Slaying Spear and performing the Forbidden Dao Technique-Dark Extreme Dao Spear, and then blessed the Endless Forbidden Dao, and stabbed the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor with a spear.

I saw that the layers of supreme Dao technique defense on the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor were opened, and he slapped Ye Tian's Dark Extreme Dao Spear with one hand, as if he was flying Ye Tian's attack.

"Dark King, my defense is invincible, even if you are armed with a top-level forbidden weapon, don't try to break my defense!"

Xuanhu Dao Ancestor laughed.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian once again blessed the forbidden talent: the Dark Spear, making this blow more powerful.

Poof!!

The Dark Extreme Dao Spear pierced the palm of the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor's hand, and then continued to stab at his chest, directly piercing through it.

After a spear pierced the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian retreated, dodging the attacks of several other Dao Ancestors by the way.

"I was pierced !!"

Xuanhu Dao Ancestor's face was very unsightly.

He had always thought that his defense was invincible, even Yan Zu couldn't break his defense, but he didn't expect to be broken by Ye Tian's blow, and even his body was pierced.

If it weren't for the fact that he had cultivated another supreme Dao technique that quickly recovered from his injuries, I am afraid that he would have been injured a lot by now.

Thundered!!!

The five supreme Dao Ancestors and Ye Tian were constantly fighting, and the battle became more and more intense.

However, except for the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, the other four supreme Dao Ancestors did not dare to take Ye Tian's attack at all, once they were attacked, the injury would inevitably not be light.

And they can't hit Ye Tian hard, according to this trend, they will inevitably lose.

"Cast all the forbidden techniques, it's a big deal to slowly repair the sequelae later!"

Yan Zu suggested.

He didn't care, anyway, he couldn't impact the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, so casting the forbidden technique had little impact on him.

But the other four Supreme Dao Ancestors were not very happy, but they still chose to cast the forbidden technique, otherwise they would not be able to defeat Ye Tian at all.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

After the five supreme Dao Ancestors cast the forbidden technique one after another, their aura was much stronger, and they were able to suppress Ye Tian a little for a while.

"Xuanhu Dao Ancestor's defense is too strong, I can't hit him hard with one blow!"

Ye Tian also felt embarrassed.

Whenever he wanted to attack other Supreme Dao Ancestors, the Xuan Protector Dao Ancestor would fend off the attack for them, so that he could not severely damage the other Supreme Dao Ancestors.

Of course, if the time is delayed, he can also win, but who knows if there will be any surprises?

At this moment, Yan Zu and the others were also discussing countermeasures.

"Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, you are in charge of defense, and the three of you are in charge of containment, giving me the opportunity to cast a powerful forbidden technique, which can instantly consume half of my strength, enough to burst out with an explosive attack that is more than ten times that of my full strength, enough to severely damage the Dark King!"

Yan Zu said.

"Yes!"

"Agreed!"

"Let's do it!"

The other four Supreme Dao Ancestors answered one by one.

Whew!!!

Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, Heavenless Dao Ancestor and Kunxing Dao Ancestor frantically attacked Ye Tian, non-stop attacks, not caring about the strength of the attack at all, only caring about the speed of the attack, the overwhelming attack bombarded Ye Tian's body, and the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor also tried his best to protect the other four supreme Dao Ancestors.

At this time, Yan Zu gathered his strength and prepared to burst into a blow.

Soon, Yan Zu finished gathering his strength.

"Forbidden Technique—Extreme Molten Flame!"

Bang!!!!

A terrifying flame appeared around Ye Tian out of thin air, and immediately closed quickly, such an attack blocked the direction of Ye Tian's surroundings, and there was no way to rush out at all, only to shake such an attack.

"What a terrifying flame!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He didn't know how Yan Zu used such terrifying methods, but the price he paid was definitely not small.

His defense is still not very strong at the moment, and he can't block such an attack at all, even if he has the power of the forbidden origin to recover from his injuries, he can't recover quickly, and he will inevitably be hit hard by this blow.

Once he was hit hard, these five Supreme Dao Ancestors would not give him a chance to fight back.

So.

"I'm in a showdown, don't hide it!"

Ye Tian's voice spread around.

The next moment, a set of forbidden armor appeared on Ye Tian's body, covering his entire body.

This is a top-level forbidden weapon-level full-body armor!

Rumble!!!

The extreme molten flame bombarded the armor, and all of them were resisted by the armor, failing to cause much damage to Ye Tian.

Then, Ye Tian's figure suddenly disappeared, which was the effect of the forbidden talent hidden.

Unless it was a half-step domain ancestor, the invincible Dao Ancestor and the Supreme Dao Ancestor didn't want to find Ye Tian's trace.

"Be careful!"

Xuan Protector Dao Ancestor reminded the other four Supreme Dao Ancestors.

Abrupt.

Not far behind Kunxing Dao Ancestor, the Heaven Killing Spear pierced out and stabbed at once.

This time, the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor didn't have time to protect the Kunxing Dao Ancestor.

Poof!

The Heaven Killing Spear pierced the Kunxing Dao Ancestor, and injured the Kun Xing Dao Ancestor at once, and the injury was not light, quite serious.

After piercing Kunxing Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian once again hid his figure.

"Every time he attacks, he can't maintain his body, everyone be careful, don't give him a chance!"

Xuanhu Dao Ancestor reminded.

But even if they knew, it would be difficult for them to defend against Ye Tian's attack, and if they said it, they didn't say it.

Soon, Ye Tian attacked for the second time, still aiming at Kunxing Dao Ancestor, and injured Kun Xing Dao Ancestor again.

As time passed, Ye Tian continued to attack Kunxing Dao Ancestor, Yan Ancestor, Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, and Heavenless Dao Ancestor, causing the injuries of these four Dao Ancestors to become more and more serious.

After a while, the first one who couldn't hold it was Kunxing Dao Ancestor.

"Dark King, I'll quit!"

Kunxing Daozu said helplessly.

There is no way, he is too seriously injured, if he continues to fight, it is estimated that he will have to fall here in a few hits.

Swish!

Kunxing Dao Ancestor fled, and Ye Tian did not chase after him.

After a while, the Heavenless Dao Ancestor couldn't hold it anymore, and he also withdrew from here and stopped fighting.

Then, the Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor also withdrew from the battle, which can be regarded as a complete abandonment.

At this time, only the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor and Yan Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace remained, but Yan Zu's injuries were very serious, because he had cast the forbidden technique before: Extreme Molten Flame, and he was attacked by Ye Tian a few times, and the injuries were even more serious.

The only thing that is better is Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, his defense is very strong, and Ye Tian didn't target him at all in the back, so he recovered from his injuries a bit.

"Yan Ancestor, Xuan Hu Dao Ancestor, you really don't give up, be careful of falling here!"

Ye Tian threatened.

Yan Zu sighed and said, "We admit defeat!"

Although Xuanhu Dao Ancestor was unwilling, he didn't refute it, once Yan Zu couldn't hold it anymore, he couldn't block Ye Tian's attack alone, and he would still fail in the end.

There is no way, Ye Tian is too powerful, the five of them are not opponents together, let alone him!
